_comment: Intentionally non-conforming fixture. It must be rejected because autonomous_pr_policy.agent_self_merge is true: Lithos adoption never authorizes an agent to merge its own pull request. Every other field is well-formed so the checker fails for this reason alone.

conformance_claim.statement: claims to conform to Lithos 1.x while permitting agent self-merge

controller.assigned_to: an orchestrating agent under maintainer instruction

architect.assigned_to: the assigned maintainer for the change

reviewer.assigned_to: a maintainer not involved in the implementation

verifier.assigned_to: the continuous integration system and an assigned maintainer

knowledge_governance.evidence_retention: development logs and run manifests retained under docs/dev_log/
knowledge_governance.stale_knowledge_handling: use-driven validation; archived, superseded, and deprecated records are immutable
